sourceDescription: Indian market (NSE-listed) sector reference distributions derived from 2024-2025 empirical data.
sourceDataset: Original raw dataset not committed; values treated as provisional reference calibration.
winsorizationPolicy: None applied at distribution level; percentile references are direct observations.
nullPolicy: Null values return neutral score 50 with method 'neutral_missing_value'.
limitations: profitGrowth, fcfGrowth, grossMargin distributions are provisional and derived from related metric patterns rather than direct empirical observation.
Peer count of 100 is approximate; actual NSE sector populations vary from 15-200+.
Sector distributions do not account for sub-sector nuances (e.g., private vs PSU banks).
Volatility distributions are based on annualized daily volatility estimates.
Reference data may not reflect post-March 2025 market conditions.
